stemHtml: Some aircraft are equipped with fuel trim tanks located in the aeroplane’s fin or horizontal stabiliser to actively manage CG position. What is a potential disadvantage of such a system?

options.a: If fuel becomes trapped in this location then an out of CG limit situation may develop.
options.b: Complicated pre-flight paper work, when completing the load and trim sheet.
options.c: The requirement for an additional fuel filling point at the rear of the aircraft.
options.d: A much increased work load for the flight crew.
